measure.CatchLine: Establishes Building Maintenance Account in State Treasury, separate and distinct from General Fund.
measure.MeasureSummary:
Establishes Building Maintenance Account in State Treasury, separate and distinct from General Fund. Directs State Treasurer to create subaccounts within account for specified state agencies. Continuously appropriates amounts in subaccounts to state agencies for purposes of repairing and maintaining buildings owned by state agencies. 
	Declares emergency, effective July 1, 2019.
measure.RelatingToFull: Relating to maintenance of buildings owned by state agencies; and declaring an emergency.
measure.RelatingTo: Relating to maintenance of buildings owned by state agencies; declaring an emergency.
measure.AtTheRequestOf: (at the request of Governor Kate Brown for Oregon Department of Administrative Services)
measure.FiscalImpact: May have fiscal impact, but no statement yet issued
measure.RevenueImpact: May have revenue impact, but no statement yet issued

sponsors.PresessionFiledMessage: Introduced and printed pursuant to House Rule 12.00.  Presession filed

historyActions.ActionText: First reading. Referred to Speaker's desk.
